title: wedelia urticifolia var. scaberrima
intro: Wedelia urticifolia var. scaberrima, also known as the rough-stemmed wedelia or rough-stemmed sneezeweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Wedelia urticifolia var. scaberrima include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and even treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
